// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated by Mutty.

#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Immutable;
using System.Linq;

namespace Mutty.Tests
{
    /// <summary>
    /// The mutable wrapper for the <see cref="User"/> record.
    /// </summary>
    public partial class MutableUser
    {
        private User _record;

        /// <summary>
        /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="MutableUser"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="record">The record to wrap.</param>
        public MutableUser(User record)
        {
            _record = record;

            Name = _record.Name;
            MiddleName = _record.MiddleName;
            Email = _record.Email;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Builds a new instance of the <see cref="User"/> class.
        /// </summary>
        public User Build()
        {
            return _record with
            {
                Name = this.Name,
                MiddleName = this.MiddleName,
                Email = this.Email,
            };
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="User"/> to <see cref="MutableUser"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator MutableUser(User record)
        {
            return new MutableUser(record);
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Performs an implicit conversion from <see cref="MutableUser"/> to <see cref="User"/>.
        /// </summary>
        public static implicit operator User(MutableUser mutable)
        {
            return mutable.Build();
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Name.
        /// </summary>
        public string Name { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the MiddleName.
        /// </summary>
        public string? MiddleName { get; set; }

        /// <summary>
        /// Gets or sets the Email.
        /// </summary>
        public string? Email { get; set; }
    }
}
